description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in AlstraSoft EPay Enterprise 3.0 (formerly DoPays) allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via multiple unspecified parameters in (1) profile.htm, (2) card.htm, (3) bank.htm, (4) subscriptions.htm, (5) send.htm, (6) request.htm, (7) forgot.htm, (8) escrow.htm, (9) donations.htm, and (10) products.htm.
